name: Coral and Jade Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Medium-size raw shrimp - peeled and deveined
1 can Cling peach slices (16 oz.) - in juice or extra light syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse shrimp and pat dry with paper towels.
2. Combine 1 tablespoon each of cornstarch, soy sauce, sugar, garlic, and shrimp; let stand for 15 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, reserve 1/4 cup peach juice. Drain peaches and cut crosswise into halves.
4. Add enough water to the reserved juice to measure 1 cup. Stir in the remaining 1 tablespoon cornstarch, 1 tablespoon soy sauce, and vinegar. Set aside.
5. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a hot wok or large skillet over high heat. Add shrimp and stir-fry for 1 minute; remove.
6. Heat the remaining 1 tablespoon oil in the same pan. Add the remaining 3 ingredients (peaches, onion, ginger) and stir-fry for 4 minutes.
7. Add shrimp and soy sauce mixture back to the pan. Cook, stirring, until the sauce boils and thickens. Stir in the peaches; heat through.
